items.name: Anna
items.title: Super comfortable
items.text: The jumpsuit feels soft but supportive. It moves with me and never feels tight.

items.name: May
items.title: Cute and practical
items.text: The fabric dries quickly after workouts and still looks polished for the rest of the day.

items.name: Nicole
items.title: Sporty and stylish
items.text: I wear it from class to gym without changing. It is comfortable, clean and easy.

items.name: Tramy
items.title: Breathable and confident
items.text: The mesh top stays airy through cardio and keeps its shape through every session.

about.title: Born to move, designed to inspire
about.intro: ATHORA is a premium activewear brand built around performance fabrics, considered silhouettes and a community that loves to move.
about.mission: Our mission is to empower every body with high-performance gear that blends support, style, comfort and innovation.

values.title: Performance
values.text: Every piece is engineered for motion, from yoga flows to high-intensity intervals.

values.title: Responsible design
values.text: We favor durable materials, cleaner finishes and low-waste production choices.

values.title: Community
values.text: We design with feedback from athletes, trainers and everyday movers.
